mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(create_time)) FROM credit_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reason = 'CHECKIN'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT create_time, @row_num := @row_num + 1 as row_num, DATEDIFF(create_time, @prev_date) as diff, @prev_date := create_time FROM credit_log, (SELECT @row_num := 0, @prev_date := NULL) r WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reason = 'CHECKIN' ORDER BY create_time DESC ) t WHERE diff = 1 OR diff IS NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT create_time FROM credit_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reason = 'CHECKIN' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
